description: Defines the types of agentic flows and how they route through the system. See /routing/sdlc.md for the three-surface lifecycle.

claude-code.description: Decomposes intent, generates issues/handoffs, makes architectural decisions

codex.description: Executes well-scoped tasks autonomously, opens PRs

copilot.description: In-IDE coding, debugging, exploratory work, PR adjustments

flows.name: Architecture Discussion
flows.description: Discuss a design question and produce an ADR draft
steps: Discuss design question with developer
Generate ADR draft in /generated/adr-drafts/
Optionally decompose into tasks and generate issue packets

flows.name: Cross-Repo Feature
flows.description: Plan and create issues for a feature spanning multiple Nodes
steps: Identify affected Nodes from catalogs
Determine dependency order for changes
Generate issue packet per repo with handoff context
Generate site-sync packet if public surface changes

flows.name: Single Repo Feature
flows.description: Plan work scoped to one repo
steps: Load repo context from /repos/{name}/
Validate feature against repo boundaries and invariants
Generate issue packet with handoff context

flows.name: Codex Task Execution
flows.description: Codex picks up a scoped task and implements it
steps: Read issue/handoff for context, acceptance criteria, constraints
Implement in target repo on a feature branch
Run tests, ensure CI passes
Open PR with implementation

flows.name: IDE Fix / Adjustment
flows.description: Developer works directly in the IDE with Copilot
steps: Developer identifies specific code to change
Copilot assists with implementation, debugging, refactoring
Developer commits and opens PR (or pushes to existing PR branch)

flows.name: Site Sync
flows.description: Propagate architecture or documentation changes to the Studios website
steps: Identify what changed (new Node, new version, new ADR)
Generate site-sync packet with content and target pages
Generate handoff for Codex to execute against Studios repo

flows.name: Canary Investigation
flows.description: Investigate a canary test failure that indicates a cross-Node boundary violation
steps: Identify which invariant was violated
Trace the violation to the responsible repo
Generate fix issue packet with invariant reference
flows.next_surface: codex or copilot depending on complexity
